subcodes.first_line: The Eye of this Youth hath beheld what no eye hath witnessed throughout all eternity, and His Ear hath hearkened unto what none hath heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد رات عین الغلام ما لاراته عین الدهر فی ازل الازال قد اسمعت اذنه ما لاسمعت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
